title: Count Back to Subtract
description: Use a number line to subtract by counting backward from the starting number.
condition: Given a subtraction expression a − b and a number line.
response: Start at a and move back b steps to find the result.
label: Production / Skill
example: To solve $11 - 2$, start at 11 and count back 2 steps to land on 9.

title: Count Objects in a Category
description: Determine the total number of objects in a given category by counting them.
condition: Given a set of objects belonging to one category.
response: Count each object once and state the total.
label: Production / Skill

title: Model Change with Subtraction
description: Represent a change-unknown word problem where a decrease occurred using a subtraction equation.
condition: Initial amount and final amount are given, with a decrease described.
label: Principle / Model
example: Mel had 16 hats and now has 10. Write $16 - x = 10$.

title: Model Resulting Unknown with Addition
description: Represent a change-unknown word problem where the result is known using an addition equation with a missing addend.
condition: Initial amount and final amount are given, with an increase described.
label: Principle / Model
example: Max had 10 nuts and now has 16. Write $10 + x = 16$.

title: Solve for Missing Addend Within 20
description: Find the unknown addend in an addition equation within 20.
condition: Given an equation of the form a + ? = b, where a and b are within 20.
response: Compute b − a to find the missing addend.
label: Principle / Model

title: Solve for Missing Subtrahend Within 20
description: Find the unknown subtrahend in a subtraction equation within 20.
condition: Given an equation of the form a − ? = b, where a and b are within 20.
response: Compute a − b to find the missing subtrahend.
label: Principle / Model
